caption: The video appears to be a presentation or discussion on the topic of "Rural Community Food System," focusing on ecological considerations and community health. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in the top right corner, likely explaining the content displayed on the screen. The main part of the screen shows a detailed diagram with various interconnected elements such as local production, consumption dynamics, and ecological considerations, all related to creating a sustainable food system. On the left side, there is an introduction section that outlines the goal of sourcing food locally from community-owned operations to benefit the community. The right side of the screen displays comments and discussions on the topic, including strategies for regeneration and addressing social justice issues within the context of a green new deal policy. The video seems to be part of a collaborative effort, inviting viewers to contribute by adding comments or becoming members to further develop the model.
